message.content: {"agentId": "candidate-constrained-llm", "decisionId": "pilot-e1-001-turn-2-player-1", "selectedActionId": "play-single-heart-4-copy1", "reasoning": "The opponent led a single heart 3 and I must follow suit in hearts. All three cards in hand (4, 9, 10 of hearts) legally beat the lead. Player 0 has only 2 cards left, so the opponent is near finishing, but conserving high cards is still important because I may need to win future tricks or cover partner. The 4 of hearts is the cheapest card that beats the 3, preserving the 9 and 10 for later. No bomb or wildcard is needed, and passing would cede control unnecessarily."}
